memory.summary: That scholarship could significantly ease my financial stress, but the immediate fun option is tempting since no one is waiting on me. I need to decide if covering costs now outweighs today's enjoyment.

desires: Finish the scholarship essay immediately so I can stop feeling like a fraud and finally secure this achievement before my energy hits absolute zero.
Avoid having to explain to Hallmate why I'm still paralyzed at 9:45 AM; I just need to get out of this uncomfortable silence without them judging my lack of progress.
Get some dopamine right now through the game stream to numb the exhaustion, because facing the conflict of asking for help or pushing through feels too painful today.

goals.description: Kill the paralysis immediately: open the document and type exactly 300 words of the scholarship essay, ignoring perfectionism, just to break the freeze response.
goals.rationale: My achievement drive is screaming that I need to produce output to feel competent. The anxiety is paralyzing me, so the only way to regain my sense of 'being an achiever' is to force physical action on the task. If I don't start now, the deadline looms closer tomorrow, and I can't handle that future failure.

goals.description: If I get stuck or the panic returns after 15 minutes, switch to the game stream for 45 mins as a reset, but set a hard alarm so I don't spiral back into avoidance.
goals.rationale: I'm too impulsive to trust myself to stop playing once I start. It's a backup plan for when the pressure becomes unbearable again. But right now, avoiding the friction of facing the blank page is more dangerous than the dopamine hit from gaming, so I'll defer this unless I crash.

agent.last_reasoning: Achievement drive demands output to crush the freeze. Starting now avoids tomorrow's panic. I'll ignore perfectionism; if stress spikes, I'll cut to gaming later. Skipping social contact is fine; no one needs me right now.

goals.description: Finish the scholarship essay intro and upload documents immediately to clear the looming deadline stress.
goals.rationale: Achievement drive is highest here; avoiding future friction (deadline panic) outweighs immediate dopamine. The 'impulsive' trait makes me want the game, but the 'avoidant' conflict style means I'll dread facing the empty form tomorrow if I don't tackle it now.

goals.description: Start the game stream later tonight once the application block is done.
